bead.title: bead: add needs-human lane helpers and counts
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The store can skip needs_human for execution, but CLI, GraphQL, and web need one shared operator-attention predicate and count model.

ROOT CAUSE
cli/internal/bead/store.go:1346-1354 defines Ready and ReadyExecution, with needs_human filtering only in execution-ready behavior. cli/internal/bead/store.go:1358-1375 defines ReadyExecutionBreakdown but no NeedsHuman query. cli/internal/bead/types.go:200 defines StatusCounts with ready/blocked totals but no needs-human or worker-ready count.

PROPOSED FIX
Add bead package helpers for needs-human metadata, Store.NeedsHuman sorted by queue order, and counts for needs_human and worker_ready. Centralize read/write helpers for needs-human-reason, needs-human-since, needs-human-source, needs-human-suggested-action, and needs-human-summary.

NON-SCOPE
CLI command wiring, GraphQL schema, execute-loop transitions, and web rendering.

DEPS
Depends on ddx-6f73d300 for the spec contract.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestNeedsHumanMetadataRoundTrip covers writing and reading needs-human metadata keys.
2. TestStoreNeedsHumanListsOpenNeedsHumanSorted verifies Store.NeedsHuman returns open needs_human beads sorted like the queue and excludes closed/non-human beads.
3. TestReadyExecutionSkipsNeedsHumanButReadyCanIncludeWhenRequested verifies worker execution skips needs_human and dependency-ready semantics remain explicit.
4. TestStatusCountsIncludeNeedsHumanAndWorkerReady verifies StatusCounts distinguishes dependency-ready, worker-ready, and needs-human counts.
5. cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... green.
6. lefthook run pre-commit passes.

events.body: {"rationale":"All 8 rubric criteria satisfied. Title is imperative ('add'), names the subsystem ('needs-human lane') and the deliverable ('helpers and counts'). Description has all four required sections: PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE with three precise file:line anchors (store.go:1346-1354, store.go:1358-1375, types.go:200), PROPOSED FIX naming specific symbols to add, and NON-SCOPE excluding CLI/GraphQL/web. AC has 6 numbered items: four name Test* functions with verifiable assertions, item 5 is 'cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/bead/... green', and item 6 is 'lefthook run pre-commit passes' — exactly the required gate pair as the final two lines. Labels carry phase:2, area:beads, kind:implementation, and two spec cross-refs (spec:FEAT-004, spec:FEAT-010). Parent (ddx-ac10e7af) and dep (ddx-6f73d300) are both explicit, with dep rationale stated inline in the description. No /tmp paths or chat references. A sub-agent reading only this bead body can identify the two target files, the four test names to implement, and the gate to run without operator hand-curation.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":[],"waivers_applied":[]}
